recovery_posture.degraded_startup_guidance: If startup fails: run workflow-dataset package install-check; run workflow-dataset vertical-packs progress; run workflow-dataset recovery suggest.

applicable_recovery_cases.name: Broken or incompatible pack
applicable_recovery_cases.when_to_use: Pack fails to load, behavior resolution errors, or pack is marked incompatible.

applicable_recovery_cases.name: Failed upgrade or migration
applicable_recovery_cases.when_to_use: Install check fails after upgrade, or migration reports errors.

applicable_recovery_cases.name: Blocked approval or policy mode
applicable_recovery_cases.when_to_use: Approval registry missing or policy blocks execution; operator cannot proceed.

applicable_recovery_cases.name: Stuck project/session/agent loop
applicable_recovery_cases.when_to_use: Project is stalled, replan needed, or agent loop not advancing.

applicable_recovery_cases.name: Invalid active workspace state
applicable_recovery_cases.when_to_use: Workspace context fails to build, or active work context is invalid.

recovery_report.degraded_startup_guidance: If startup fails: run workflow-dataset package install-check; run workflow-dataset vertical-packs progress; run workflow-dataset recovery suggest.

rollback_hints: Use workflow-dataset upgrade rollback --checkpoint <id> if upgrade fails.
